scripts.build: prisma generate && next build && cp -r public .next/standalone/ && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/ && (cp -r node_modules/.prisma .next/standalone/node_modules/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp -r node_modules/@prisma .next/standalone/node_modules/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp prisma/schema.prisma .next/standalone/prisma/schema.prisma 2>/dev/null || mkdir -p .next/standalone/prisma && cp prisma/schema.prisma .next/standalone/prisma/schema.prisma)
